title: Samsung's Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 is both slimmer and tougher than its predecessor - Engadget
summary: Samsung has unveiled the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 at today's Unpacked event and said it was designed for "extreme outdoor adventures and high-performance seekers." The new Ultra comes with a shock-resistant titanium casing for durability.
